name: Baked French Toast
servings: serves 4 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 30-35 minutes
method: In a large mixing bowl, whisk the eggs, milk, granulated sugar, ½ teaspoon ground cinnamon, and salt.
Spray a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray. Arrange the bread slices in the dish.
Pour the egg mixture on top of the bread slices, soaking them well.
In a small mixing bowl, combine the brown sugar and remaining ground cinnamon. Top the bread slices with the mixture.
Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden-brown in color.
Let the French toast cool slightly before serving with powdered sugar or a drizzle of honey or maple syrup.
